message:
feat(web): Add zoom controls and micro-text GlyphAtlas

SequenceView:
- Add zoom in/out buttons with +/- UI
- Display current zoom level label
- Register +/-/= hotkeys for zoom control

useSequenceGrid:
- Expose zoom scale and preset state
- Add zoomIn, zoomOut, setZoomLevel methods
- Add onZoomChange callback support

GlyphAtlas:
- Implement micro-text bitmap fonts for 4-8px cells
- 4x6 pixel nucleotide glyphs (A, C, G, T, N)
- 5x7 pixel amino acid glyphs (all 20 + X and *)
- Auto-detect micro mode based on cell dimensions
- Pixel-perfect rendering at small sizes

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
